def positive_single_feature_requires_edits_in_many_unrelated_modules_due_to_scattered_policy():
    rule_id = "single_feature_requires_edits_in_many_unrelated_modules_due_to_scattered_policy"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag feature flows whose policy is fragmented across many unrelated modules."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
